title: SMF offers bonds and sukuk worth IDR 6.2 trillion
body: SMF plans to issue Shelf-Registration Bonds and Sukuk Musyarakah worth IDR 6.2 trillion next month to expand its financing.

title: RK reveals upstream-downstream expansion plans for Jabarano Coffee
body: RK outlined plans to increase the number of Jabarano outlets. He emphasized the huge potential for growth if the business scales beyond 10 branches.

title: Spent IDR 31.63 billion, Jonathan Tahir raises stakes in SRAJ
body: Jonathan Tahir raises his stakes at the managing company of Mayapada Hospitals.

title: WIKA secured new contracts worth IDR 20.66 trillion at the end of 2024
body: "All of these projects use a monthly payment scheme with upfront payments, allowing the company to operate independently while focusing on more efficient cash management."

title: Proven guilty of monopoly practice, KPPU fined Google LLC IDR 202.5 billion

title: SMKL to produce environmentally-friendly paper pulp moulding

title: Plantation sector is overweight, are LSIP & AALI attractive?

title: WEGE booked IDR 2.66 trillion of new contracts in 2024, see 2025 outlook
body: Entering 2025, WEGE sets new contract target of IDR 3.58 trillion, up 34.43% compared to last year.

title: BINO rose to top gainers, KJEN seen at top losers

body: With 1.44 billion shares sold, GOTO continues to hold the title for the highest net sell

title: TPIA taps funds to repay maturing bonds
body: TPIA readies funds to settle Shelf-Registration Bonds II Phase III 2020 maturing on February 12, 2025.

title: GRIA targets sales of 642 housing units in 2025
body: With the strategies in place, Ingria Pratama is optimistic it can achieve its revenue target of IDR 120.8 billion and a net profit of IDR 7.1 billion in 2025.

title: Cement industry faces challenges, see INTP and SMGR’s prospects
body: Bagged cement sales are the beacon of hope for manufacturers this year as government cuts the budget for infrastructure sector.

title: MESOP conversion completed, ARTO shares climb up
body: ARTO completes first MESOP conversion of 4.31 million shares

title: Successful IPO, CBDK acquires venue and MICE company for IDR 2.3 trillion
body: In line with CBDK’s IPO prospectus, the IDR 2.3 trillion raised by the company from this corporate action has now been transferred to IPN.

title: Stock split plan approved, SAMF shares rally
body: SAMF shares have rallied in the past week since the stock split plan was approved last week (16/1).

title: Unveil the successor of Oei Tjie Goan as TKIM’s controller
body: Jackson Wijaya Limantara is the successor to Teguh Ganda Wijaya as the controlling shareholder of TKIM.

title: Wahyu Dwi Jatmiko buys 304 million shares of Logisticplus International (LOPI)

title: Donald Trump revokes electric vehicle mandate
body: President Donald J. Trump will revoke the executive order regarding electric vehicles to help sustaining the automotive industry of the US.

title: To be acquired by Djarum, DATA showed 59.09% jump in price in one week
body: DATA's price significantly jumped along with the acquisition plan initiated by Djarum Group.

title: Inaugurated as US President again, Trump to issue series of controversial mandates
body: The US will issue several policies that pose significant impacts on several sectors following the inauguration of President Donald Trump.

title: Opening the week, BBRI and BIPI led Top Net Buy
body: BBRI and BIPI topped the net foreign buy leaderboard this Monday (20/1).

title: One year after IPO, GRPH shares fell 51.43%
body: GRPH's share performance fell 51.45% after a year of its capital market debut on January 18, 2024.

title: HOKI to buy Gurih rice
body: HOKI signed a rice sale and purchase contract with PT Gurih Mitra Perkasa.

title: Acquiring ministry contract, JAST promised 30% revenue growth in 2025
body: “With this achievement, combined with the extended projects from 2024, JAST has successfully recorded a 30% revenue increase in early 2025 compared to 2024.”

title: Credit distribution projected to slow down in Q1 2025
body: Credit distribution in Q1 2025 is projected to be lower than Q4 2024, albeit higher than Q3 2024.

title: SOLA to secure asphalt contract in West Kutai
body: SOLA acquires project contract worth IDR 416.97 billion in West Kutai, East Kalimantan.

title: BUKA responds to PKPU petition
body: BUKA believes that PKPU petition has no legal power, as the company has no outstanding obligations owed to the petitioner.

title: Joining in, MUTU participates in inaugural carbon exchange trading
body: As part of its contribution, MUTU purchased 30% of emission produced by the company in this first international carbon exchange trading.

title: Media Retail Indonesia becomes a new investor of 5.85% of Era Media (DOOH) shares
body: Central Business Alliance Pte Ltd follows by acquiring 9% of CCSI shares.

title: IDXCarbon kicks off global carbon trading
body: IDXCarbon reported growth in carbon trading value and volume in 2024.
